title: James McLaughlin, Member - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## James McLaughlin, Member
James McLaughlin is an Attorney and Member of the Murthy Law Firm, the nation’s leading immigration practice. With nearly twenty-years of legal immigration experience, James has built a national reputation for innovative, client-focused solutions in complex immigration matters – including labor certification, immigrant petitions (employment-based and family-based), adjustment of status and consular processing, H1B, H2A, H2B, naturalization, audits, motions, requests for reconsideration, and global mobility. James represents small-and medium-sized business as well as individual clients throughout Maryland, the United States and across the globe.
Prior to joining Murthy Law Firm, James practiced immigration law in Boston, Massachusetts, representing large multinational organizations and universities on employment-based immigration matters.

## Types of Cases Worked on by Attorney James McLaughlin
Mandatory and Discretionary Bases for Denying Forms I-485 and N-400
Murthy Success: Securing a Green Card for a Surviving Spouse
EB2 or EB3: Understanding the Difference

## Education and Admissions
- J.D., Franklin Pierce School of Law
- B.S., Financial Management cum laude , Franklin Pierce University
- Bar Admissions: Massachusetts
